name: Sandstorm Metals & Energy Ltd.
description: Sandstorm Metals & Energy Ltd. was a Canadian-based company originally spun off from Sandstorm Gold in 2010 to focus on volumetric production payment transactions within the base metal and fossil fuel sectors. The company operated as a resource royalty and streaming entity, providing capital to mining and energy projects in exchange for future production rights. Following its independent operations, Sandstorm Metals & Energy Ltd. was subsequently re-acquired by its parent company, Sandstorm Gold, in 2014, effectively consolidating its assets back into the broader precious metals royalty portfolio.
